key_insights.insight: Age is just a number in business; energy, passion, and perseverance are more important.
key_insights.quote: Age is just a fucking number. And you can either mention that number endlessly, or you can look at what energy do you have at that moment in time to execute on your dream.

key_insights.insight: When seeking investment, understand and counteract potential biases in investors by tailoring your presentation style.
key_insights.quote: If I'm in a room of predominantly men, I want to go in and a female trait to me is you want to paint the entire picture. You want to bring somebody into your business and join the dots. You don't give them the dot joiner.

key_insights.insight: Retention of customers is paramount for sustained business success, more crucial than aggressive growth.
key_insights.quote: Retention is everything. You've got to down more growth. You've got to have new customers. But if you don't have the bedrock of retention, the kind of classic, you know, like companies that don't do any publicity... they're relying on the customer loving it.

key_insights.insight: Match your internal feelings with your external actions for authenticity and fulfillment.
key_insights.quote: Matching your inside to your outside is probably my biggest journey, you know, of how can I, what I feel inside to.

key_insights.insight: If you are unhappy in your job, develop a plan and leave; life is too short to spend the majority of your time doing something you hate.
key_insights.quote: Leave it, but have a plan, but leave it. Like if you hate what you do, we spent 16 hours a day between commuting or if you're in a higher position thinking about the company, working. We spend much more of a day working than sleeping. So you've got to love it.

key_insights.insight: Grief manifests differently for everyone, and it's crucial to allow yourself the time and space to fully feel it without judgment.
key_insights.quote: Sometimes you need space you need to you know... brought up in a way to be able to just feel some things that I hadn't really let myself feel...and give ourselves that right breathing space to be able to feel the fullness of that feeling without judgment or guilt or remorse

key_insights.insight: Success is less about achieving a specific destination and more about the continuous forward motion, challenge, and progress, especially with people you enjoy working with.
key_insights.quote: Success can't therefore possibly be any destination. It is the forward motion and progress. It is forward motion. It is challenge. It is autonomy. It is a meaningful goal to strive towards and it's doing it with people I love.

actionable_advice.advice: If you feel insecure in a professional setting, actively learn the knowledge and skills you lack.
actionable_advice.how_to: Listen to podcasts, read books, and actively seek knowledge to contribute more effectively.

actionable_advice.advice: Incorporate regular facial massage into your skincare routine to improve lymphatic drainage and skin health.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a scissor-like motion with your fingers for friction, lift cheekbones, and stimulate lymph nodes, ensuring upward and outward movements.

actionable_advice.advice: When presenting a business idea to investors, frame the pitch to directly address their specific concerns.
actionable_advice.how_to: If they ask about downside risk, acknowledge it briefly, then pivot to emphasize the upside potential and scaling opportunities.

memorable_stories: Trini describes her time working on a trading floor where she dressed in men's clothing to blend in and hide her gender.
Trini recounts being kicked out of rehab for playing a pornographic film as a way to lighten the mood.
Trini shares how she sold all her clothes and rented out her house to raise money to start Trini London.
contrarian_claims: Imposter syndrome is not about being an imposter, but about a lack of knowledge, and that can be fixed by learning more.
Stability, defined as accomplishment and completed goals, can actually feel like chaos. The opposite of this is progress and movement, where the most stability is created.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Trinny Woodall: How She Went From Drug Addict To Building A $300m Business Empire!
